description:
Items found during the 111-template restyle sweep (2026-07-03, batches A-D) that were out of sweep scope. All pre-existing, none urgent.

**Functional:**
1. wormhole_system_list.html pagination `hx-include`s `#wh-class-filter`/`#wh-effect-filter` — IDs removed when wormholes.html moved to toggle buttons, so paging drops active filters. Thread the wf-btn toggle state into the paging links.
2. live_pcu_tile.html + `/api/live-pcu` (app/routes/dashboard.py:851) orphaned since 600c6fe removed the seed div from tools_activity.html — delete both, or re-seat the tile.

**Convention stragglers (batch A predates the z-index convention):**
3. intel_kills.html:34 + intel_kills_search.html:30 autocomplete dropdowns at z:50 == --z-nav — normalize to 20 like gatecheck/planetary/structure_timers/skill_plan_detail.

**CSS dedup:**
4. `.kf-*` rules duplicated between intel_kills and intel_kills_search.
5. `.range-btn` rules now defined verbatim in 3 template style blocks (character_detail, mining_ledger, structure_timers) — promote to site.css.

**Decisions needed (user judgment):**
6. ~~status.html/status_data.html still Tailwind-eve styled~~ — DONE 2026-07-04 (Phase 0 audit, commit 38a4bf5): both migrated to b-* design system, zero eve-* classes remain.
7. Gate base.html scripts on user_id so the anonymous login page ships a slimmer payload.
8. gatecheck partials use inline `style="color:var(--danger)"` where components.css offers `.b-stat-val.is-danger`/`.is-accent` modifiers — align on a future pass.
title: Restyle sweep deferred fixes (post-SP2 close-out)
